---
title: 'Soda Shop Competition'
date: '2016-06-05T22:08:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Cornerstone Restaurants'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '70056762750794710'
blogger_filename: '/2016/06/soda-shop-competition.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Cornerstone Restaurants/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Research'
---

<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>Beth Marie's Old Fashioned Ice Cream parlor:</strong></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.bethmaries.com/" href="http://www.bethmaries.com/" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.bethmaries.com/</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>John Besh's Soda Shop in the WWII Museum:</strong></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.nationalww2museum.org/american-sector/the-soda-shop.html" href="http://www.nationalww2museum.org/american-sector/the-soda-shop.html" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.nationalww2museum.org/american-sector/the-soda-shop.html</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>Hip Hop Soda Shop (Not direct competition completely different genre/flavor. But uses the idea:</strong></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.hiphopsodashop.com/" href="http://www.hiphopsodashop.com/" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.hiphopsodashop.com/</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
Major Chain Concept A&amp;W All American Food:</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.awrestaurants.com/#/home" href="http://www.awrestaurants.com/#/home" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.awrestaurants.com/#/home</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<br /></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>Suzy Q's Soda Fountain, Mansfield</strong></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.suzyqssodafountain.com/" href="http://www.suzyqssodafountain.com/" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.suzyqssodafountain.com/</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>Soda and Candy:</strong></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.candycarrollton.com/candy-soda-pop/" href="http://www.candycarrollton.com/candy-soda-pop/" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.candycarrollton.com/candy-soda-pop/</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>Jerry Van Dyke</strong>&nbsp;(played "Luther" on coach - brother to Dick Van Dyke) Owned a soda shop too. May be closed?"</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://littlerock.about.com/cs/thingstodo/p/aajerrysodashop.htm" href="http://littlerock.about.com/cs/thingstodo/p/aajerrysodashop.htm" style="color: #00aadc;">http://littlerock.about.com/cs/thingstodo/p/aajerrysodashop.htm</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/200/1034039/restaurant/Little-Rock/Jerry-Van-Dykes-Soda-Shop-Benton" href="http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/200/1034039/restaurant/Little-Rock/Jerry-Van-Dykes-Soda-Shop-Benton" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.urbanspoon.com/r/200/1034039/restaurant/Little-Rock/Jerry-Van-Dykes-Soda-Shop-Benton</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.encyclopediaofarkansas.net/encyclopedia/entry-detail.aspx?entryID=4386" href="http://www.encyclopediaofarkansas.net/encyclopedia/entry-detail.aspx?entryID=4386" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.encyclopediaofarkansas.net/encyclopedia/entry-detail.aspx?entryID=4386</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
Although it was sold in 2001, the ice cream and soda shop continues to operate as Jerry Van Dyke’s Soda Shop.</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>For additional information:</strong>“Jerry Van Dyke.” Internet Movie Database.&nbsp;<a data-mce-href="http://www.imdb.com/name/nm0886733/" href="http://www.imdb.com/name/nm0886733/" rel="/external" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.imdb.com/name/nm0886733/</a>&nbsp;(accessed March 17, 2008).</div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<strong>Soda Supplies?</strong></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<a data-mce-href="http://www.olddocs.com/results.aspx?cat=Drinks" href="http://www.olddocs.com/results.aspx?cat=Drinks" style="color: #00aadc;">http://www.olddocs.com/results.aspx?cat=Drinks</a></div>
<div style="color: #3d596d; font-family: Merriweather, Georgia, 'Times New Roman', Times, serif; font-size: 15px; line-height: 25.5px; margin-bottom: 24px;">
<br /></div>
